introSection: Spinning Coaster was a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster located at Jawa Timur Park 1 in Batu, East Java, Indonesia.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders sat back-to-back in two rows.

fullText:
Spinning Coaster was a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster located at Jawa Timur Park 1 in Batu, East Java, Indonesia.



Single car trains. Riders sat back-to-back in two rows.
